title: Heap Sort Implementation
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a C code that implements the heap sort algorithm using a recursive approach. The code should include a function to build the heap and another function to recursively sort the array. The generated code should ensure that the array is sorted in ascending order.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct C syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (C syntax and recursive function definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive heap sort algorithm.
